external_citations.chosen_convention: Use the standard proton interpolating operator together with a zero-momentum Euclidean two-point correlator and parity projection, matching the narrow local PyQUDA example.

external_citations.title: Hadron Spectroscopy with Lattice QCD
external_citations.why_needed: The local PyQUDA proton example fixes the implementation path; this curated review record documents the physics-side proton spectroscopy convention without implying live online lookup.
